name: June 10: Nevada primaries, childcare costs, and the Fallout Fringe Festival returns
summary: Takeaways from Nevada's 2026 primary election, negotiating childcare availability and costs during summer break, and Vegas' largest fringe festival returns for its second year — all that and more on the latest episode of KNPR's State of Nevada.

name: Las Vegas Strip Casino Income Dropped 80% in 2025: Is Sin City Dying?
summary: Las Vegas Strip casinos have suffered a fresh financial blow, with regulators reporting an 81% year-on-year drop in net income in 2025.

name: UNLV doctor details sunscreen significance of FDA approving new UV-blocking ingredient
summary: The Food and Drug Administration has approved a new sunscreen active ingredient for use in over-the-counter products, marking the first time in roughly 20 years that Americans will have access to a new formula.

name: UNLV physicists test X-ray method to regenerate lithium-ion batteries
summary: Researchers aim to extend battery life in electric vehicles, phones and laptops instead of sending packs to landfills

name: Nellis AFB, UNLV collaborate on preserving the base’s history
summary: The 99th Air Base Wing History Office at Nellis Air Force Base, Nev., has launched a collaboration with University of Nevada, Las Vegas to digitize its collection of more than 50,000 newspaper pages, some articles dating back to the base’s earliest days in World War II.

name: Is Fibermaxxing Safe? Dietitians Support the Trend but Only if You Avoid These Mistakes
summary: Most people are getting fibermaxxing wrong — and they don’t even know it.

name: 5 Reasons the Fibermaxxing Trend Is Making You Feel Worse (and How to Fix Each One)
summary: Fibermaxxing is trending — but doubling your fiber overnight could seriously wreck your gut health.

name: The Financial Maneuvering That Put Cannabis On The NYSE
summary: Historically, cannabis companies operating in the United States have been locked out of one of the most fundamental tools available to American businesses: the ability to list on a major U.S. stock exchange. On June 5, 2026, that changed.

name: Large psilocybin dose briefly improved dementia in case study: What to know
summary: A case study published in Frontiers in Neuroscience is making big waves in the dementia research community.
